# Image Pack — Greybridge Partners (l-consulting-v01)

Synthetic images for IKAM multimodal benchmarks.

## Folders
- `logos/` — logo explorations
- `people/` — synthetic staff headshots
- `social/` — marketing templates (LinkedIn, one-pagers)
- `diagrams/` — consulting frameworks (matrices, roadmaps, dashboards)

## Metadata
- `prompts.jsonl` (JSON per line)

Required keys: id, out_path, kind, prompt, negative_prompt, model, checkpoint, sampler, steps, guidance, width, height, seed, created_at
Optional: style_tags, notes, source_case_id

## Style
- Vibe: premium, calm, analytical.
- Palette: charcoal + off-white + muted gold accent.

## Safety
- No real client logos.
- No real people likeness.
